title: Path Blazer Friction Power Monster Truck Speed Boat Hauler With Trailer
description:
The Path Blazer Friction Power Monster Truck Speed Boat Hauler belongs in every child's room. Combining the fun of a 9" friction propelled monster truck, and the cool factor of a sporty 10" speed boat, this toy is a can't-miss gift. The detachable trailer allows your child's creativity to run wild. Unhitch the trailer and start blazing trails with the large, realistic truck, or hook it back up and help your child learn the mechanics of hauling a trailer. The easy gliding pull back friction power means the fun doesn't stop because of batteries. With awesome vehicle details and a durable construction, the Friction Monster Truck Speed Boat Hauler is sure to be your child's new favorite toy, and might even make Dad jealous! No batteries necessary! Great for
